physical_source: Output of drone PPK processing in TBC / Emlid Studio / RTKLIB / cloud
how_to_obtain: Pre-processing produces geotagged images with embedded position (EXIF GPS tags or sidecar file). CBMI reads geotag position, per-image fix status, count, CRS metadata, timestamps.
notes: Per-image artifact. Q-flag conventions are software-agnostic (Q=1 = FIXED). When sidecar accompanies image, may include per-image σ.

physical_source: Output of GCP coordinate processing (PPK / CORS / cloud / customer-supplied)
how_to_obtain: Pre-processing produces per-GCP coordinates with σ values. CBMI reads per-point ID, position, σ_h, σ_v.
notes: Per-point structure. σ is the universal anchor for trust scoring.

physical_source: Output of check-point coordinate processing (mostly inherited from RTK capture)
how_to_obtain: Per-CP coordinates with σ values. Feeds verification_status, not pre_processing_score.
notes: When absent (no CPs designated) → verification_status=UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS; pre_processing_score still computes from other blocks.

physical_source: Filled by operator at survey upload
how_to_obtain: Operator declares path categories, software/version, CRS/datum/geoid/height-mode, baseline, mountpoints, antenna models, accuracy targets, customer-supplied accuracy claims. Required for declared_manifest tier indicators.
notes: Manifest design bounds what the chain can detect. Approach 1 baked in here. Operator-declarative (not verified against actuality unless processing report present).

file_extensions: .pdf / .xml / .txt (TBC adjustment report / Emlid Studio log / RTKLIB status)
physical_source: Generated by processing software during pre-processing
how_to_obtain: Operator uploads optionally. When present, enables detailed_manifest_with_report tier indicators (CORS continuity, time-sync, settings consistency, GCP residuals, CORS station health). When absent, those indicators score as advisory only.
notes: v1: TBC parser baked in. Emlid Studio and RTKLIB parsers deferred to v2. Report-absent reality: not reliably uploaded.
